message.content:
[
  {
    "title": "European Values Study (EVS) 2017 Integrated Dataset",
    "series": "EVS",
    "year": 2017,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "International politics and organisations",
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Political ideology"
    ],
    "description": "Cross-national survey on values including political ideology, trust in institutions (e.g., EU, UN), political participation and attitudes."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2014 – Citizenship II",
    "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
    "year": 2014,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Political ideology"
    ],
    "description": "Measures citizenship norms and behaviors, political participation, rights and obligations across countries."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2017 – Role of Government V",
    "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
    "year": 2017,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Political ideology"
    ],
    "description": "Attitudes toward government's responsibilities, spending priorities, regulation, and civil rights."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2013 – National Identity III",
    "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
    "year": 2013,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "International politics and organisations",
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Political ideology"
    ],
    "description": "National identity, attitudes toward globalization, immigration, and supranational organizations."
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer Trend File 1970–2002",
    "series": "Eurobarometer",
    "year": 2002,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "International politics and organisations",
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Conflict, security and peace"
    ],
    "description": "Harmonized trend dataset from Standard Eurobarometer surveys covering public opinion on the EU, international politics, security, and institutions."
  },
  {
    "title": "ALLBUS (German General Social Survey) 2018",
    "series": "ALLBUS",
    "year": 2018,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Political ideology"
    ],
    "description": "German general social survey featuring political self-placement, political attitudes on democracy and institutions."
  },
  {
    "title": "GLES 2017 – Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Study",
    "series": "German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES)",
    "year": 2017,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Political ideology"
    ],
    "description": "German federal election campaign study measuring political behavior, vote intention, issue positions, and ideology."
  },
  {
    "title": "European Election Study (EES) 2019 Voter Study",
    "series": "EES",
    "year": 2019,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "International politics and organisations",
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Political ideology"
    ],
    "description": "Cross-national survey on political behavior, party preferences, and attitudes toward the EU and its institutions."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 2004 – Citizenship I",
    "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
    "year": 2004,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Political ideology"
    ],
    "description": "Baseline module on citizenship norms, political participation, and civic engagement across countries."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP 1995 – National Identity I",
    "series": "International Social Survey Programme (ISSP)",
    "year": 1995,
    "host": "GESIS",
    "topics": [
      "International politics and organisations",
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Political ideology"
    ],
    "description": "Foundational cross-national module on national identity, patriotism, and attitudes toward international integration."
  }
]
